Partnerships & Collaborations

Stronger Together
Through Collaboration

Building India's aerospace ecosystem through strategic alliances with government bodies, world-class academia, leading industries, and global organisations.

25+
Partner Organizations
10+
Countries Reached
15+
Academic Institutions
5+
Govt. Bodies
Our Network

Strategic Partnerships

From government agencies to global research institutions — every partnership is built to accelerate aerospace innovation in India.

government

Airports Authority of India

Strategic partnership for aerospace infrastructure development, safety training programmes, and workforce capability enhancement across Indian airports.

InfrastructureAviation SafetyTraining
academia

IIT Madras & IIT Guwahati

Collaborative academic programmes including specialised B.S. degrees, joint research initiatives, and student exchange opportunities in aerospace engineering.

Academic ProgramsResearchSTEM
government

ISRO

Scientific collaboration for space technology awareness, research outreach programmes, and student engagement with India's premier space agency.

Space ResearchTechnologyMissions
government

StartupTN

Empowering aerospace startups in Tamil Nadu through incubation support, ecosystem development, and policy-level advocacy for the sector.

StartupsIncubationPolicy
international

ICAO & UN-SGAC

Global partnerships for international aviation standards alignment and active participation in the Space Generation Advisory Council for youth representation.

Global StandardsSpace PolicyYouth
industry

AeSI, IEI & HEMSI

Collaborations with professional societies for member development, joint certification programmes, networking events, and cross-industry knowledge exchange.

Professional GrowthNetworkingCertification
academia

Anna University & VIT

Technical education partnerships offering joint workshops, faculty exchange, lab access, and curriculum development support for aerospace programmes.

CurriculumLabsFaculty Exchange
industry

HAL & DRDO

Industry collaboration for internship placements, technical exposure to advanced aerospace manufacturing, and defence R&D knowledge transfer to members.

InternshipsManufacturingR&D
international

Global Research Labs

International research partnerships enabling collaborative studies, scholar exchange, and joint publication in frontier aerospace and space science domains.

ResearchPublicationsExchange
Why Collaborate

The IAAA Advantage

Partnering with IAAA connects you to India's largest aerospace professional community and opens doors to industry-defining initiatives.

Strategic Alignment

Partners align with IAAA's vision to build a world-class aerospace ecosystem in India.

Mutual Growth

Every collaboration drives growth for both IAAA and partner organisations through shared resources.

Talent Pipeline

Partners gain access to IAAA's vast pool of aerospace professionals, students, and researchers.

Recognition

Official co-branding, awards, and recognition at national aerospace events and publications.

How to Get Started

Three simple steps to becoming an IAAA collaboration partner

01

Reach Out

Send us your collaboration proposal or partnership enquiry via our contact form.

02

Discussion

Our team connects with your organisation to understand mutual goals and define scope.

03

Partnership

Sign an MoU or partnership agreement and launch collaborative programmes together.

Partner With Us

Ready to Build
Something Great Together?

Join our growing network of organisations shaping the future of aerospace in India. Whether you are in government, academia, industry, or a global body — there is a place for you in the IAAA ecosystem.

Propose a Partnership Learn About IAAA
IAAAAerospace Institute

Empowering India's Aerospace Community — From School to Sky. India's premier institute for aerospace education, training, and research.
